name: HIGH: Citywide Traffic Congestion Surge
description: High-severity traffic events distributed across ALL 5 zones.

name: CRITICAL: Cascading Multi-Zone Crisis
description: Citywide critical storms, accidents and health emergencies across all zones.

name: MEDIUM: Citywide Air Quality Drift
description: Moderate air-quality readings across all zones.

name: LOW: Citywide Public Gatherings
description: Population events spread across all zones.

name: CRITICAL: Industrial Chemical Disaster Cascade
description: Multi-domain cascade in the industrial zone: severe chemical pollution triggers respiratory health emergencies, mass evacuation, traffic collapse, and a wind/storm dispersion factor — designed to exercise complex Esper pattern syntax (sequence, quantifiers, negation, optional events).
